subcodes.first_line: In this day, they who have appeared in the Name of Truth and who gaze toward His horizon must be adorned with the ornament of spiritual virtues, so that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز باید نفوسیکه باسم حق ظاهرند و بافقش ناظر بطراز اخلاق روحانیه مزین باشند تا
subcodes.subjects: @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @words vs deeds, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @work as worship
